author: ninglg
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Auto-renders markdown headings as a colorful, interactive mindmap — no extra syntax required.

manifest.author: Light Ning
manifest.description: Auto-renders markdown headings as a colorful, interactive mindmap — no extra syntax required.
manifest.name: Light Mindmap

name: Light Mindmap

releases.author: ninglg
releases.description:
## 1.2.1

- Borderless style: text-only at all depth levels
- Lazy render hidden mindmaps
- Update FAB text to 'Light Mindmap'

releases.author: ninglg
releases.description:
## What's New

- **Collapse / Expand nodes** — press Space to toggle; collapsed state is persisted in markdown
- **Collapse badge** — collapsed nodes show a + indicator after text, visible in both the canvas and exported PNGs
- **Slate theme** — new mid-tone blue-grey theme with a subtle tech grid background
- **Touch support** — drag to pan and pinch to zoom on touch devices

## Improvements

- Tab on a collapsed node auto-expands it and adds a new child
- Double-click or F2 on a collapsed node auto-expands it and enters edit mode
- Enter on the root node no longer creates a sibling
- Balanced layout preserves left/right side assignment when collapsing or expanding
- Returning from source view auto-fits the mindmap to the viewport
- Borderless node style now renders correctly in PNG export

## Removed

- 1:1 zoom button (use Fit instead)

releases.author: ninglg
releases.description:
## What's New

- **Doodle Node Style**: Hand-drawn look with slight rotation and irregular borders
- **PNG Export**: Export mindmap as high-resolution PNG image via toolbar button
